Dialog.name: MSG_717_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 1 212}However it turns out, this is the end... I'm goin' all out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_717_2_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 2 212}I'm nowhere near Takaya's level, but I've improved since we last fought. You can't hide your weaknesses from me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_717_2_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 1 212}...Hm? What the hell...? You covered up all your weaknesses!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 1 212}Damn cowards... Can't even handle getting knocked down!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_717_2_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 1 212}I've improved since our last fight. You better be ready![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_717_3_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 1 212}Tch, you guys are as tough as ever... But I ain't gonna lose this time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_717_4_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 1 212}No... Not yet. We're just gettin' started... You ain't the only ones who came prepared...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_717_4_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 1 212}Watch this... Now you'll see what I can really do![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_717_5_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 9 1 212}You're not... beating me... I'll die before I let you pass![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_717_6_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}We came here for a reason... You think this is gonna stop us!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_717_7_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}Performance-enhancing drugs!? At that concentration, the side effects must be...[n]{f 1 1}
